final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input U_D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (U_D == 1'b1) begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
        else begin
            Q <= Q - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
